title: Mosvera Modifier
description: An adjustment applied to a template or composition. A modifier is a partial aesthetic object — the delta it represents — deep-merged onto its base via the MEP-0001 merge operation (declarative-shape, not operation-based). It may use the $unset/$revert directives to remove or roll back fields. Aesthetic content is open at v0.1. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0.

$schema.description: Identifies this document as a Mosvera modifier of a given version.

id.description: The modifier's own name, by which compositions reference it.

$unset.description: Fields this modifier removes from the base it is applied to (MEP-0001).

$revert.description: Fields this modifier rolls back to the pre-layer value (MEP-0001).
